results.title: You won’t believe what pregnant Madhuri Dixit endured for 13 hours to shoot THIS ‘Dola Re’ scene
results.description: Read further to now how Saroj Khan choreographed 'Dola Re Dola' from the floor for 15 days, while a pregnant Madhuri Dixit refused to skip a single step.

results.title: Suriya’s Karuppu Becomes His Biggest Box Office Success In Years
results.description: Karuppu collected Rs. 94 crore in 4 days at the Indian box office. The Suriya starrer is set to become the actor’s first Rs. 100 crore grosser.
